reference: Dear Sir, my sperm count is thirty%, total motility is fifty%. Sperm motility is as follows: Grade I - thirty%, Grade II - thirty%, Grade III - twenty%, Grade IV - twenty%. Sperm morphology shows normal percentage, abnormal ten%, and dead sixty%. Pus cells are between eight to ten. Can you please tell me if my report is normal or not? If it is not normal, could you suggest which treatment I should pursue?
text: Dear sir, my sperm count is thirty percent. Total motility is fifty percent. Sperm motility is as follows: grade I, thirty percent, grade two, thirty percent, grade three, twenty percent, grade four, twenty percent. Sperm morphology shows normal percentage, abnormal ten percent, and dead sixty percent. Pus cells are between eight to ten. Can you please tell me if my report is normal or not? If it is not normal, could you suggest which treatment I should pursue?
